summary: Tested Set Comparison View & Approval Gate for Multi-Set Papers. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright - all required UI elements present and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Approval gate correctly implemented: downloads return 403 when setsApproved=false
generate-multiset correctly resets setsApproved to false when regenerating
approve-sets endpoint correctly sets setsApproved=true with approvedBy and approvedAt
perSetStats includes typeDistribution for each set as required
Frontend SetComparisonView component has all required data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Test ID 3ffdc3c1-081c-4ffc-80a2-c270b3028c2c with Blueprint ID a3eb5e1b-3275-4c27-892e-29dca016aa0c
context_for_next_testing_agent: Set Comparison View and Approval Gate features are fully functional. The approval workflow works correctly: regenerate sets -> downloads blocked (403) -> approve sets -> downloads allowed (200). Frontend /hod/generate-paper page has all required elements including comparison-table, comparison-status, comparison-actions, button-approve-sets, and button-regenerate-sets.
verified_features: POST /api/tests/:id/generate-multiset - returns perSetStats with typeDistribution per set (mcq: 10, short_answer: 5 for each set)
POST /api/tests/:id/approve-sets - approves sets, returns setsApproved:true with approvedBy and approvedAt
GET /api/tests/:id/paper-pdf?set=1 BEFORE approval - returns 403 with message 'Sets must be approved by HOD before downloading'
GET /api/tests/:id/paper-pdf?set=1 AFTER approval - returns 200 with PDF content (3240 bytes)
GET /api/tests/:id/paper-docx?set=1 BEFORE approval - returns 403
GET /api/tests/:id/paper-docx?set=1 AFTER approval - returns 200 with DOCX content (10842 bytes)
GET /api/tests/:id/answer-key-pdf?set=1 BEFORE approval - returns 403
GET /api/tests/:id/answer-key-pdf?set=1 AFTER approval - returns 200 with PDF content (2290 bytes)
POST /api/tests/:id/generate-multiset AFTER approval resets setsApproved to false
Frontend: /hod/generate-paper page renders with test selector (data-testid='select-test')
Frontend: Set count selector present (data-testid='select-set-count')
Frontend: Validate button present (data-testid='button-validate-pool')
Frontend: Generate button appears after validation (data-testid='button-generate-multiset')
Frontend: Set Comparison View renders (data-testid='set-comparison-view')
Frontend: Comparison table shows Set A/B/C with metrics (data-testid='comparison-table')
Frontend: Comparison status shows balanced/imbalance (data-testid='comparison-status')
Frontend: Comparison actions section present (data-testid='comparison-actions')
Frontend: Approve Sets button visible (data-testid='button-approve-sets')
Frontend: Regenerate Sets button visible (data-testid='button-regenerate-sets')
Frontend: HOD dashboard Generate Paper tab shows 'Multi-Set Paper Generator' button (data-testid='button-generate-paper')

frontend_verification.login_page: Renders correctly with school code, email, password fields
frontend_verification.hod_dashboard: Shows 4 tabs: Review Questions, Blueprint Manager, Generate Paper, Send for Approval
frontend_verification.generate_paper_tab: Shows 'Multi-Set Paper Generator' button with description

paper_generator_page.title: Paper Generation & Approval - HOD Dashboard
sections: Multi-Set Paper Generation - Generate non-overlapping question sets (A/B/C)
Download Papers - 3 sets available for download
Submit to Principal - Send approved papers for principal review
All Papers Status - Overview of all exam papers

approval_gate_workflow_verified.step_1: Regenerate sets -> setsApproved reset to false
approval_gate_workflow_verified.step_3: Approve sets -> setsApproved set to true
